mapper.select: SELECT vd.*, u.name as university_name, u.level as university_level, u.province as university_province, m.name as major_name, m.category as major_category, ap.min_score, ap.min_rank, ap.avg_score FROM volunteer_detail vd LEFT JOIN university u ON vd.university_id = u.id LEFT JOIN major m ON vd.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN admission_plan ap ON ap.major_id = m.id AND ap.university_id = u.id WHERE vd.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY vd.priority

SELECT vd.*, msm.matching_score, msm.importance_level, msm.description as matching_description FROM volunteer_detail vd LEFT JOIN major_subject_matching msm ON msm.major_code = ( SELECT code FROM major WHERE id = vd.major_id ) WHERE vd.id = #{volunteerDetailId}
